Name: Pirate
Notes: Aggressive: orbit 80 burst 5 no retreat. Sniper: orbit 220 dmg x1.5. Flanker: flips orbit dir. Coward: flees at 50% hp stops shooting after hit.

Name: Drone
Notes: Tanky slow. No AI style variants.

Name: Interceptor
Notes: No shooting. Explodes on player contact. Very fast.

Name: Battleship
Notes: Tanky. HP overridden to 120 * diff_mult in _apply_difficulty. Slow but high reward.

Name: Sniper
Notes: Keeps max distance. Bullet dmg scales with diff_mult. Fragile.

Name: Minelayer
Notes: No direct shooting. Lays proximity mines.

Name: Carrier
Notes: Spawns smaller enemies. Very slow. Medium reward.

Name: Void Sentinel
Notes: Bullet dmg scales with diff_mult. Slow but tough. Deep space only.

Name: Miner NPC
Notes: Does not move. Friendly. Not killable (no hp logic found).

Name: Cargo Freighter
Notes: Has HP but no combat. Likely can be damaged/destroyed. Check cargo_freighter.gd for loot.

Name: Player Ship
Notes: MAX_SPEED = 280. speed_cap = 280 + player_speed_bonus. player_speed_bonus starts at 120 in GameState — effective cap = 400 at start (likely dev value).
